Static.Name: PolarityLabel
Static.Help: Shows and sets the polarity of the current tune file

NonEditCombobox.Name: Polarity
NonEditCombobox.Help: Shows and sets the polarity of the current tune file

Static.Name: TuneIonModeLabel
Static.Help: Shows the ionization mode required by the tune file

NonEditCombobox.Name: TuneIonMode
NonEditCombobox.Help: Shows and sets the ion source mode of the current tune file
NonEditCombobox.CmdList: MSTN_ChangeIMode API_ES | MSTN_ChangeIMode APCI | MSTN_ChangeIMode APPI | MSTN_ChangeIMode "MM-ES+APCI" | MSTN_ChangeIMode "MM-ES" | MSTN_ChangeIMode "MM-APCI"

Static.Name: InstIonModeLabel
Static.Help: Shows the actual ionization mode read from the MSD

StatusList.Name: InstIonMode
StatusList.Help: "Shows the actual ionization mode read from the MSD"

Static.Name: CalLabel
Static.Help: Selects the calibrant setting to be sent to the MSD at MSOn

NonEditCombobox.Name: CalMode
NonEditCombobox.Help: Selects if calibrant is activated at next MSOn
